title: FAMILY DAY 2 — Living-room dance with Mama Song
prompt: Wide shot in @living-room, golden hour sunlight slanting through the window, a colorful play rug. STRONG bouncy ukulele + handclaps + tambourine kids'-show music plays. @Mama in the CENTER spins joyfully, holding @Sara's hand on the LEFT and @Eva's hand on the RIGHT — all three twirling together in a tight circle, hair flying, laughter ringing. All three singing together brightly: "Ma-ma-ma-ma LOVES us! Ma-ma-ma-ma HUGS us! Ma-ma-ma-ma — best best BEST!" Glitter confetti rains. Lens flare. Pure joy.
